creator: bitbucket63-it@yahoo.com
text:
Trying to upgrade linux-flashplugin9 fails because the file
libflashsupport.so is not fetchable from the one site listed in the Makefile.

Fix: 

Find a current version of libflashsupport.so that can be downloaded.
How-To-Repeat: Try to install or upgrade linux-flashplugin9
